asset.title: Wiki Note Grounding
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The workflow preview demonstrates the relationship between a diligence note and grounded cells in a spreadsheet. It uses clear annotations to guide the viewer through the transition, though some UI transitions are abrupt.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows a note and then highlights the corresponding grounded cells in the spreadsheet, though the linking action itself is implicit.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the start state in the note tab, a transition step, and the final grounded spreadsheet view.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode layout with clear multi-pane structure, though text overlays are manually added.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the NodeRoom paradigm of chat, notes, spreadsheets, and agent traces.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Appears to be a genuine UI capture, enhanced with explanatory text overlays.

legibility.evidence: Main text and spreadsheet cells are readable, though trace logs at the bottom are quite small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for financial analysts and diligence workflows involving structured data grounding.

productionHonesty.evidence: Clearly uses annotations to explain the flow rather than pretending the UI automatically displays those exact text labels.

observedEvidence: Note tab displaying 'Sync reliability - diligence note'
Spreadsheet tab displaying financial rows and a 'NOTE' column
Highlighted 'Grounded cells' annotation in the spreadsheet view
Agent trace panel at the bottom of the screen

defects.observed: Abrupt transition with a static text overlay 'Open Spreadsheet next' instead of showing the actual click path.
defects.fix: Show the mouse cursor navigating and clicking the Spreadsheet tab to make the transition feel more natural.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: See how NodeRoom grounds diligence notes directly to specific cells within your financial spreadsheets, ensuring traceability.
